The plant is native to South America and is closely related to other species within the same family. The classification of Decaloba semilunaris is based on its botanical characteristics and morphological features. Further research may be required to confirm its exact classification within the Passifloraceae family.
uses: Decaloba semilunaris is used in traditional medicine for various purposes, including treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
